questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to TLS Handshake?
options: Inefficient scaling of TLS 1.3 key exchange (ECDHE) protocol, cipher suites negotiation, and session resumption.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of TLS 1.3 key exchange (ECDHE) protocol, cipher suites negotiation, and session resumption.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how TLS 1.3 key exchange (ECDHE) protocol, cipher suites negotiation, and session resumption scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
